allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 6500,9772,14976,22260,29132 | ForEach-Object { $p = $_; try { $cmdline = \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine; [PSCustomObject]@{Id=$p.Id;Name=$p.Name;CommandLine=$cmdline} } catch { [PSCustomObject]@{Id=$p.Id;Name=$p.Name;CommandLine="N/A"} } } | Format-List)
